svg.title: Formatted CLI output example
svg.desc: Terminal screenshot-style example showing a pre-op scheduling triage result with patient name, rule results, and gathered evidence.
svg.text: Explanation: REQUIRED_TESTING: Latest CMP result must be completed within 14 days before the procedure date.

text.tspan: High-risk procedures require a CMP within 14 days before the procedure date.

svg.text: - Latest CMP result must be completed within 14 days before the procedure date.
- CMP is 22 days before the procedure date.

text.tspan: Patient has blood pressure within acceptable range for surgery
Patient has a normal fever for surgery
History and Physical must be completed within 30 days before the procedure date.
A signed surgical consent must be present prior to surgery
High-risk procedures require a CBC within 14 days before the procedure date.
High-risk procedures require a CMP within 14 days before the procedure date.
Low or moderate risk procedures require a CBC within 30 days before the procedure date.
Patients taking anticoagulation medication require a complete perioperative management plan
